steps.title: Find the needed verb
steps.content: The subject is the singular noun phrase "The extensor digitorum brevis." The sentence needs a finite main verb that agrees with that singular subject.

steps.title: Use a finite verb
steps.content: A, B, and D are nonfinite verb forms: a participle, an infinitive, and a perfect participle. "Bears" is a finite present-tense verb that agrees with the singular subject. The answer is C.
